from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class OrderServiceDeps:
    db: "DatabaseConnection"
    cache: "RedisCache"
    logger: "Logger"
    email_client: "EmailClient"
    metrics: "MetricsCollector"


class OrderService:
    def __init__(self, deps: OrderServiceDeps):
        self._deps = deps

    def create_order(self, order_data: dict) -> dict:
        self._deps.logger.info("Creating order")
        return {"id": "order-123", "status": "created"}


@dataclass
class ReportGeneratorDeps:
    db: "DatabaseConnection"
    s3: "S3Client"
    pdf_engine: "PdfEngine"
    template_loader: "TemplateLoader"


class ReportGenerator:
    def __init__(self, deps: ReportGeneratorDeps):
        self._deps = deps

    def generate(self, report_type: str) -> bytes:
        template = self._deps.template_loader.load(report_type)
        return self._deps.pdf_engine.render(template)


def build_order_service(config: dict) -> OrderService:
    deps = OrderServiceDeps(
        db=DatabaseConnection(config["db_url"]),
        cache=RedisCache(config["redis_url"]),
        logger=Logger("orders"),
        email_client=EmailClient(config["smtp"]),
        metrics=MetricsCollector(),
    )
    return OrderService(deps)
